case_title: GOTTLIEB KENNETH I VS PECK RAMONA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PECK RAMONA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOTTLIEB KENNETH I RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PECK RAMONA $140.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $168.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $140.00 FILED BY GOTTLIEB KENNETH I AS TO DEFENDANT PECK RAMONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
